headline: Solstice Joins S&P MidCap 400 As AI Play Draws Valuation Focus
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials (NasdaqGS:SOLS) has been added to the S&P MidCap 400 index as part of the latest quarterly rebalancing. The change reflects the company's growing role in materials used across the AI and semiconductor supply chain. Index inclusion can influence trading activity as passive funds that track the S&P MidCap 400 adjust their holdings. For investors watching the AI supply chain, Solstice Advanced Materials now sits inside a widely followed benchmark, the S&P MidCap...
